cinder-circlet.name: Cinder Circlet
cinder-circlet.description: A scorched crown that sharpens the mind beneath falling ash.

ironwall-greathelm.name: Ironwall Greathelm
ironwall-greathelm.description: A reinforced plate helm for soldiers who advance into fire without hesitation.

runic-cowl.name: Runic Cowl
runic-cowl.description: A hood stitched with containment runes that quiet unstable magic near the skull.

viper-mask.name: Viper Mask
viper-mask.description: A sleek venomous-green mask that dulls the wearer's presence and sharpens lethal intent.

templar-crest-helm.name: Templar Crest Helm
templar-crest-helm.description: A cresthelm blessed at the cathedral's high anvil, worn by ordained holy warriors.

windtracker-cap.name: Windtracker Cap
windtracker-cap.description: A waxed hunting cap fitted with a hidden compass needle for tracking prey into the wind.

warlord-warhelm.name: Warlord's Warhelm
warlord-warhelm.description: A fearsome warhelm passed between warlords whose names echo through history as legend.

lich-crown.name: Lich Crown
lich-crown.description: A crown of frozen bone worn by a sorcerer who outlived every empire they served.

phantom-veil.name: Phantom Veil
phantom-veil.description: A veil that makes the wearer a ghost between heartbeats; witnesses see only shadow.

seraph-halo.name: Seraph Halo
seraph-halo.description: An ethereal halo granted by a dying angel to a champion of absolute and unshaken faith.

hurricane-hood.name: Hurricane Hood
hurricane-hood.description: Woven from stormclouds by a ranger who survived seven hurricanes alone in the wilds.

leather-cap.name: Leather Cap
leather-cap.description: A simple cap that keeps the rain off and the worst blows softened.

wool-hood.name: Wool Hood
wool-hood.description: A heavy wool hood favored by traveling monks.

iron-skullcap.name: Iron Skullcap
iron-skullcap.description: Bare-bones head protection. Better than nothing.

cloth-circlet.name: Cloth Circlet
cloth-circlet.description: A simple headband stitched with minor focusing runes.

scout-bandana.name: Scout Bandana
scout-bandana.description: A dark bandana that keeps hair and sweat out of your eyes.

steel-helm.name: Steel Helm
steel-helm.description: Standard military issue. Dented but dependable.

arcanist-circlet.name: Arcanist Circlet
arcanist-circlet.description: A thin silver circlet etched with concentration glyphs.

shadow-cowl.name: Shadow Cowl
shadow-cowl.description: A deep cowl that keeps the face hidden and the mind sharp.

pilgrim-hood.name: Pilgrim's Hood
pilgrim-hood.description: Blessed during the Long Walk. Comforts the faithful.

tracker-hat.name: Tracker's Hat
tracker-hat.description: A wide-brimmed hat that shades the eyes for long-distance spotting.

doomhelm.name: Doomhelm
doomhelm.description: A horned war helm blackened by dragonfire. Inspires terror.

mindfire-crown.name: Mindfire Crown
mindfire-crown.description: A crown of crystallized thought-flame. Spells come faster.

nightwalker-mask.name: Nightwalker Mask
nightwalker-mask.description: A featureless black mask. Those who wear it seem to vanish mid-sentence.

divine-mitre.name: Divine Mitre
divine-mitre.description: A ceremonial mitre that channels divine will into mortal form.

eagle-helm.name: Eagle Helm
eagle-helm.description: A winged helm worn by master rangers who command the frontier.

frostguard-helm.name: Frostguard Helm
frostguard-helm.description: A helm of permafrost ore. Keeps the head warm and the mind clear.

iceweave-hood.name: Iceweave Hood
iceweave-hood.description: A hood spun from frostbloom fibers. Enhances magical focus.

frozen-crown.name: Frozen Crown
frozen-crown.description: A crown of living ice. Frost spirits whisper secrets to the wearer.

basalt-warhelm.name: Basalt Warhelm
basalt-warhelm.description: A helm carved from solid basalt. Heavy but nearly unbreakable.

emberweave-cowl.name: Emberweave Cowl
emberweave-cowl.description: A hood woven from fire-resistant fibers. Enhances fire magic.

void-crown.name: Void Crown
void-crown.description: A helm of compressed void. Protects the mind from psychic assault.

paradox-hood.name: Paradox Hood
paradox-hood.description: A hood that exists in multiple states simultaneously.
